channel.title: Asylum Seekers on Lucky Taorem | Tech & AI Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Asylum Seekers on Lucky Taorem | Tech & AI Blog

item.title: UK’s Flawed AI Face Scans for Asylum Seekers Spark Outrage
item.description: The UK plans AI facial scans for asylum age checks despite bias risks. Learn how flawed tech could alter lives and why experts demand accountability.
